title: astragalus ruiz-lealii
intro: Astragalus ruiz-lealii, also known as Mexican milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus ruiz-lealii include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
